reasoning: The control SC-22 focuses on architecture and provisioning for name/address resolution services, which primarily relates to DNS and network infrastructure management. In Kubernetes, DNS is typically managed by CoreDNS or an equivalent DNS service, but the specific checks mentioned (e.g., deletion protection, multi-AZ deployment) are more relevant to cloud infrastructure services like load balancers and databases. Kubernetes does not inherently manage these aspects as they pertain to cloud provider-specific infrastructure management. Therefore, this control is not directly applicable to Kubernetes security checks.
title: Architecture And Provisioning For Name/Address Resolution Service
